[Gulf of Riga] LATVIAN NAV WARN 001/26
ICE NAVIGATION IS ESTABLISHED IN IRBE STRAIT AND GULF OF RIGA

FROM FEBRUARY 2, 2026, 1000 UTC.

RESTRICTIONS:
- TOWING IS NOT PERMITTED.
-NOT RECOMMENDED TO OPERATE A VESSEL WITHOUT AN ICE CLASS AND WITH DWT OF LESS THAN 2,000

MORE INFORMATION:
- ICE BREAKER 'VARMA/YLKV', VHF 16 OR
13,  +37125770806, +37128362968, VARMA@LVRFLOTE.LV
-RIGA HARBOUR MASTER  +37167082001,  CAPTAIN@ROP.LV
-VTSC “RIGA TRAFFIC”, VHF 09 OR 16 SATIKSME@ROP.LV  +37167082032
